query:
-- named_unverified contacts with emails on hot/warm active projects — Apollo gap-fill candidates
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  c.enrichmentSource,
  COUNT(*) as contact_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.linkedin IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_linkedin
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.priority, c.enrichmentSource
ORDER BY p.priority, contact_count DESC;

  AND (p.suppressed = false OR p.suppressed IS NULL)
GROUP BY p.priority, c.enrichmentSource
